title: PVP essentials Refined
description: A high-performance PvP HUD mod for Fabric 1.21.11 with crystal & anchor optimizations, built-in armor HUD, FPS display, and multiple configurable in combat syastem
body:
PVP Essentials Refined+ 3.0.0 
================

![new Hud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/861a9c52cd4ee9204eb5030673143eadcc6ba535.jpeg)

[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/DlA1yH1r?style=plastic&logo=modrinth&labelColor=0D1117&color=4facfe&logoColor=ffffff)](https://modrinth.com/mod/DlA1yH1r) [![Source Code](https://img.shields.io/badge/Source-GitHub-blue?style=plastic&logo=github&logoColor=ffffff)](https://github.com/Fronobear1/PVP-Essential-refined-2.0.9) [![Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/Fronobear1/PVP-Essential-refined-2.0.9?style=plastic&logo=github&logoColor=ffffff&color=ff5555)](https://github.com/Fronobear1/PVP-Essential-refined-2.0.9/issues) [![Fabric Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-7d5fff?style=plastic&logo=fabric&logoColor=ffffff)](https://fabricmc.net/) ![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1448091?logo=curseforge&style=plastic)


![stattus effact timers added](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cee4616d10a8ef309813d5b8fb8a60111b98e53.png)

 What is New added
======

Import and export of the config added 
and the config screen and enable disable mod added 

Requird
 ======
[Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

[Mod menu ](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

 New Status effect timers added
============

PVP Essentials Refined is a high-performance Minecraft Fabric mod intended for PvP combat in 1.21.11.

It provides a fixed, stable, and fully configurable combat HUD with a strong focus on clarity, accuracy, and FPS-friendly rendering.

This version eliminates all external dependencies and brings significant optimizations and new PvP HUD systems.

### _** Core Features**_

 **Advanced Crosshair Feedback** 
================
Crosshair turns red when it is perfectly aligned with an entity hitbox
Offers immediate aim confirmation in quick PvP fights
Adds in precise timing for sword, axe, and crystal combat

**Combat Item HUDs (4 Modes)**

There are four different combat HUD layouts available, and all of them are customizable:

Ender Pearls
Arrows (all types correctly counted)
Golden Apples (regular and magical)
Optional additional combat indicators

Each HUD:

Has fixed screen anchoring
Functions perfectly in fullscreen and windowed mode
Never shifts or scales incorrectly

 **Armor HUD (Built-In)**
================
Fully integrated armor HUD (no dependency required)
Shows equipped armor with durability indicators
Optional numeric or percentage durability display
Warning indicators for low durability
Horizontal and Vertical Layouts Supported

**Crystal & Anchor Optimization**

Optimized client-side logic for End Crystals and Respawn Anchors

Reduces unnecessary calculations during PvP

Enhances consistency and FPS in intense battles

 FPS Display
==========

Lightweight FPS counter

Correct real-time updates

Configurable position and visibility

Zero performance overhead

 Configuration & Customization

Completely configurable via Mod Menu

Positions, orientation, scale, and behavior that can be adjusted

Intended to prevent GUI conflicts with other PvP mods

All the effects are applied in real time, without the need for a restart.

 Performance & Stability
================

No external dependencies

Optimized rendering paths

Multiplayer-safe and client-only

Stable behavior for all resolutions and aspect ratios

Optimized specifically for competitive PvP scenarios

 Design Philosophy

PVP Essentials Refined covers:

Fixed and predictable HUD placement

Very little visual clutter

Real-time combat feedback

Clean and modern PvP graphics

This mod is designed for players who want the maximum amount of information with the least amount of distraction.
